title: Trade Council (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''Trade Council''' could refer to several organizations:

*'''[[Trade Council]]''' of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], charged with overseeing the commercial climate in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
*'''[[New Republic Trade Council]]''', a sub-committee of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] to keep trade open and free.
*'''[[Prackla Trade Council]]''', an association of businessbeings and merchants based on [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]] in the [[Prackla sector/Legends|Prackla sector]].
*'''[[Trade Federation Occupation Council|Trade Council]]''', another name for the Occupation Council of the [[Trade Federation of Planets|Trade Federation]].

==See also==
*[[Council]]
